data.title: Gong appoints Chris Peake as Chief Trust Officer to ensure data security.
data.description: On August 25, 2025 in San Francisco, Gong, a leading Revenue AI company, disclosed the appointment of Chris Peake as Chief Trust Officer. This decision highlights their dedication to assisting businesses achieve successful results while prioritizing the security of their data.

data.title: Hydro-Québec's net income rose by $432 million to $2,277 million in H1 2025, with investments of $3.3 billion, up $0.5 billion from 2024.
data.description: In the first half of 2025, Hydro-Québec disclosed a net income of $2,277 million, marking a $432 million increase from the same period in 2024. This growth is attributed largely to favorable weather conditions that boosted market performance during the initial quarter. Simultaneously, the company sustained its commitment to advancing the Action Plan 2035 – Towards a Decarbonized and Prosperous Québec, with investments totaling $3.3 billion in the first six months of 2025, indicating a $0.5 billion surge from the previous year. The strategic approach involved capitalizing on lucrative export prices while managing imports effectively. Discover more details on this report by visiting Benzinga.com.

data.title: Roadrunner Venture Studios chosen to lead $25M quantum initiative in New Mexico for innovation acceleration.
data.description: In Albuquerque, New Mexico on August 25, 2025, Roadrunner Venture Studios, a prominent venture studio specializing in deep tech innovation, revealed its appointment by the New Mexico Economic Development Department (EDD) to spearhead a $25 million program aimed at fast-tracking quantum innovation.

data.title: Pivot > Group expands Banking Practice, appoints Kathy Lonowski as Managing Director to lead the team.
data.description: Manhattan Beach, California, August 25, 2025 - Pivot > Group, a prominent financial advisory firm focusing on strategic, operational, and restructuring solutions, revealed the growth of its Banking Practice. Kathy Lonowski has been appointed as the new Managing Director to lead this development.

data.title: Justin Bird from Sempra wins 2025 Lifetime Achievement GRIT Award for energy leadership. Over 20 years at Sempra.
data.description: In Houston on August 25, 2025, Justin Bird, who serves as the Executive Vice President of Sempra and also acts as the CEO of Sempra Infrastructure, was honored with the prestigious 2025 Lifetime Achievement GRIT Award. Recognized as a key figure in driving North America's energy revolution, Justin has devoted more than two decades to Sempra. His leadership has been instrumental in shaping the company's success in the energy sector.

data.title: Inventors from Canada develop the COZY CUP to keep hot beverages appealing; TRO-1402.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on August 25, 2025, two inventors from Ignace, Ontario, Canada shared their inspiration for creating the COZY CUP. Their goal was to develop a unique cup that could preserve the temperature and freshness of hot beverages until the final sip. The innovative design of the COZY CUP ensures that coffee and other drinks stay hot and appealing. This invention offers a solution for keeping beverages at the desired temperature, potentially revolutionizing the drinking experience.
